title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Focused on calm, evidence-aware consultations for digestive, menstrual and fertility-related concerns.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Specialises in sports injuries, chronic pain management and post-operative rehabilitation using integrated TCM approaches.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Over 20 years of clinical experience in internal medicine, with particular expertise in respiratory and immune conditions.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Passionate about paediatric TCM, helping children with eczema, allergies and recurrent colds through gentle herbal and acupuncture protocols.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Expert in dermatological conditions, treating eczema, acne and psoriasis with herbal medicine and dietary guidance.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Dedicated to women's health across all life stages, from adolescent menstrual issues to menopausal support.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Skilled in tuina massage and bonesetting for musculoskeletal injuries, back pain and joint conditions.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Integrative practitioner combining traditional herbal medicine with modern diagnostic understanding for optimal patient outcomes.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Special interest in stress-related disorders, sleep disturbance and anxiety management through acupuncture and herbal formulae.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Geriatric care specialist supporting older adults with mobility issues, chronic pain and general vitality.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Renowned for precise acupuncture techniques in treating neurological conditions, headaches and vertigo.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Holistic approach to weight management, metabolic disorders and digestive health through customised herbal protocols.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Expertise in eye health, treating dry eyes, blurred vision and eye strain with traditional TCM ophthalmology methods.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: ENT specialist treating sinusitis, allergic rhinitis and tinnitus with acupuncture and herbal steam therapy.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Preventive healthcare advocate helping patients maintain wellness through seasonal adjustments and lifestyle counselling.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Focused on cancer support care, managing chemotherapy side effects and improving quality of life.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Rehabilitation specialist using acupuncture, tuina and therapeutic exercise for stroke recovery and neurological rehabilitation.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Expert in male health concerns including fertility support, prostate health and sexual wellness.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Passionate about mental-emotional wellbeing, using Five Element acupuncture for depression, anxiety and emotional balance.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Skilled in facial rejuvenation acupuncture and cosmetic TCM for natural anti-ageing treatments.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: General practitioner with broad expertise across all TCM disciplines, welcoming patients of all ages.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Specialises in cardiovascular health, supporting patients with hypertension, palpitations and circulation issues.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Expert in urinary and kidney health, treating recurrent UTIs, kidney stones and prostate conditions.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Dental-oral specialist treating gum disease, oral ulcers and TMJ disorders with TCM herbal protocols.

title: Registered Chinese Medicine Practitioner
bio: Proctology specialist treating haemorrhoids, anal fissures and rectal conditions with minimally invasive TCM methods.
